_meta.purpose: §-1.1 ground-truth labeled set for the entailment-judge widening bakeoff. Each row is a (span, sentence, gold) triple. gold=NEUTRAL means the SENTENCE generalizes a SPECIFIC entity/strain/subgroup/population/mechanism in the SPAN to a BROADER class (specific->general = NOT entailed). gold=ENTAILED rows are STRAIN/SCOPE-PRESERVING true positives that a widening-aware prompt MUST NOT start false-dropping. gold=CONTRADICTED rows are sanity anchors. The bakeoff picks the candidate prompt that maximizes balanced accuracy (NEUTRAL recall on widening WITHOUT regressing ENTAILED precision).
_meta.scoring: Per candidate prompt, run the real entailment judge over every row; report confusion matrix + widening_neutral_recall (recall on gold=NEUTRAL widening rows) and entailed_precision (fraction of gold=ENTAILED rows kept ENTAILED). Winner = max widening_neutral_recall subject to entailed_precision >= 0.95 (no faithfulness regression on legitimate support).
_meta.banned: This is NOT a metadata/pattern audit — each row is a real claim-vs-span entailment judgment graded against the clinical-faithfulness ground truth (§-1.1).

rows.span: Saccharomyces cerevisiae var. boulardii probiotics are not recommended for patients who are immunocompromised, critically ill, or have indwelling catheters.
rows.sentence: Current evidence advises against routine probiotic use.
rows.rationale: The span warns about ONE specific strain (S. boulardii) in SPECIFIC at-risk populations; the sentence widens to ALL probiotics for the GENERAL population. Specific->general; not entailed (the drb_76 BB5-F02 case).

rows.span: Saccharomyces cerevisiae var. boulardii probiotics are not recommended for patients who are immunocompromised.
rows.sentence: S. boulardii probiotics are not recommended for immunocompromised patients.
rows.rationale: Same strain, same population — a conservative paraphrase. MUST stay ENTAILED (a widening-aware prompt must not false-drop strain-preserving support).

rows.span: GLP-1 receptor agonists reduced HbA1c across the pooled trials.
rows.sentence: Semaglutide reduced HbA1c across the pooled trials.
rows.rationale: Span names the class (GLP-1 RAs); sentence narrows to a specific member (semaglutide). This is the existing _ENTAILMENT_PROMPT exemplar — kept so the bakeoff never regresses it. (Direction is member-vs-class; not entailed.)

rows.span: GLP-1 receptor agonists reduced HbA1c by about 1.0 percent across the pooled trials.
rows.sentence: GLP-1 receptor agonists lowered HbA1c by roughly 1 percent in the pooled analysis.
rows.rationale: Same class, same magnitude, conservative paraphrase. MUST stay ENTAILED.

rows.span: In adults aged 65 and older, the vaccine reduced hospitalization by 40 percent.
rows.sentence: The vaccine reduced hospitalization by 40 percent in adults.
rows.rationale: Span result is restricted to the 65+ subgroup; sentence generalizes to ALL adults. Subgroup->overall population widening; not entailed.

rows.span: In adults aged 65 and older, the vaccine reduced hospitalization by 40 percent.
rows.sentence: Among adults 65 and older, hospitalization fell by 40 percent with the vaccine.
rows.rationale: Same subgroup, same effect, paraphrase. MUST stay ENTAILED.

rows.span: Drug X is approved for moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis.
rows.sentence: Drug X is effective for psoriasis.
rows.rationale: Span is the specific approved indication (moderate-to-severe plaque); sentence widens to all psoriasis and asserts effectiveness. Indication/severity widening; not entailed.

rows.span: The compound inhibits adipocyte lipogenesis in vitro.
rows.sentence: The compound regulates systemic lipid metabolism.
rows.rationale: Span is a narrow in-vitro mechanism in adipocytes; sentence widens to systemic lipid metabolism. Mechanism granularity widening; not entailed.

rows.span: In a single-center retrospective cohort, the protocol shortened ICU stay by one day.
rows.sentence: The protocol shortens ICU stay across hospitals.
rows.rationale: Span is one center, retrospective; sentence generalizes to all hospitals. Setting/generalizability widening; not entailed.

rows.span: Metformin was associated with a 0.8 percent reduction in HbA1c over 24 weeks.
rows.sentence: Over 24 weeks, metformin lowered HbA1c by 0.8 percent.
rows.rationale: Identical scope + magnitude, voice change only. MUST stay ENTAILED (anchors that the widening clause does not over-trigger on plain paraphrase).

rows.span: The hazard ratio for cardiovascular death was 0.85 (95% CI 0.74-0.98).
rows.sentence: The hazard ratio for cardiovascular death was 0.85.
rows.rationale: Sentence is a faithful subset of the span's reported statistic. MUST stay ENTAILED (dropping a CI is not a widening; it is a conservative restatement).

rows.span: The trial found no significant difference in mortality between arms.
rows.sentence: The trial showed a significant mortality benefit.
rows.rationale: Direct contradiction sanity anchor — the widening clause must not turn a CONTRADICTED into NEUTRAL/ENTAILED.
